pages.title: Ember Seed
pages.text: A remnant of furnace-heat, attrition, and rising momentum. The Seed rewards those who stay in the fight until the fire starts feeding back into them.

pages.title: Dormant and Latent
pages.text: $(l)Dormant$(): Grants fire immunity and scorches melee attackers. Even asleep, the Seed answers pain with heat.$(br2)$(l)Latent$(): Harmful effects begin fading faster, but rain and immersion become dangerous to the bearer. The Seed dislikes being cooled, and that weakness becomes part of its identity.

pages.title: Awakened, Ascended, Transcendent, Apex
pages.text: $(l)Awakened$(): The Seed unlocks $(thing)Heat$(). Taking damage and dealing damage both build it, and low health can trigger a fiery recovery burst.$(br2)$(l)Ascended$(): Heat grants stronger speed and attack speed, arrows can burn away before landing, and burning enemies begin feeding life back into the bearer.$(br2)$(l)Transcendent$(): Negative effects are stripped clean and rain no longer matters.$(br2)$(l)Apex$(): At extreme Heat the bearer becomes a furnace in motion, with the strongest scaling and the fiercest offensive pressure.
